1000658252.english: At first, I'd like you to stroke my head.

1000658253.english: - I stroked Sirene's hair as if I were combing it.

1000658255.english: - Sirene who had jumped into my arms embraced me with her arms.
1000658255.korean: - 품에 뛰어든 세이렌이 두 팔로 날 끌어안았다.

1000658257.english: - The girl who had finally learned to say what she wanted confessed, constantly pouring out her desires and admitting that all her changes were thanks to me.
1000658257.korean: - 원하는 걸 원한다고 이야기할 수 있게 된 소녀는 바라는 걸 끊임없이 털어 놓으며, 자신이 바뀌어가는 건 전부 내 덕분이라고 고백했다.

1000658258.english: - Impressed by those words, I strived to fulfill everything Sirene desired...
1000658258.korean: - 그 말이 인상 깊었던 나는, 세이렌이 원하던 전부를 이뤄주기 위해 노력했고...

1000658259.english: - Even the next day, when Undine, who had gone to work, returned and woke us with a blush, we were still asleep, holding each other tightly.
1000658259.korean: - 다음날 출근한 운디네가 얼굴을 붉히며 깨워줄 때에도, 우리는 꼭 껴안은 채 잠들어 있었다.

1000658261.english: - I have no thoughts. Because they have no thoughts.
1000658261.korean: - 나는 생각이 없다. 왜냐하면 아무 생각이 없기 때문이다.

1000658262.english: - In other words, my brain is resting. Because it's just as important as resting your body.
1000658262.korean: - 다르게 표현하면 뇌를 쉬고 있다. 육체를 쉬는 것만큼이나 중요한 일이니까.

1000658263.english: - Oh, there's a stain on the wall... No, I shouldn't be thinking about things like that.
1000658263.korean: - 아, 벽에 얼룩이- 아니지, 이런 것도 생각하지 말아야 하는데.

1000658264.english: - I was spending a time of no thought, no desire, and no want when the door opened.
1000658264.korean: - 무념 무상 무욕의 시간을 보내는데 문이 열렸다.

1000658266.english: No, I thought the master might be lonely.
1000658266.korean: 아뇨~ 주인님이 외롭게 계실 거 같아서요.

1000658267.english: I came here because I felt like I needed someone by my side, and as expected, I was right.
1000658267.korean: 곁에 누가 있어야 될 것 같아서 찾아왔는데 역시나네요.

1000658268.english: Seriously, what would you have done alone if I hadn't come~?
1000658268.korean: 정말, 제가 안 왔으면 혼자서 어쩔 뻔했어요~?

1000658270.english: - Thetis jumped right onto me as I was lying down. When I inhaled, I was unexpectedly startled and coughed.
1000658270.korean: - 테티스는 누워있는 내 위로 그대로 뛰어들었다. 숨을 들이마실 때 예상치 못한 충격을 받아 기침이 튀어나왔다.

1000658271.english: Huh~? Why~? Did I do something wrong~?
1000658271.korean: 으응~? 왜요~? 제가 무슨 잘못이라도 했나요~?

1000658272.english: For a perverted master like you, that would be a reward, wouldn't it? Heh heh.
1000658272.korean: 왕변태 주인님한테는 오히려 포상일 텐데~ 킥킥.

1000658274.english: - That's what I would have said before, but...

1000658275.english: - Form is emptiness, emptiness is form. There's no reason to paint a color onto an intangible ball to give it substance. I guess I'll just relax and meditate some more.
1000658275.korean: - 색즉시공 공즉시색. 실체가 없는 공에 색을 칠해 실체를 만들 이유는 없다. 느긋하게 명상이나 더 해야겠군.

1000658276.english: What, what is it? Is that it?

1000658277.english: Hmm... You seem different than usual. Well, it doesn't matter, but!
1000658277.korean: 우음... 뭔가 평소랑 다르시네요. 뭐, 상관 없지만!

1000658278.english: Master, would you like to play a game with me?

1000658279.english: - I don't even want to look at a game for a while.

1000658280.english: Oh, come on! Not something like Steel Line Online, but a more fun game.
1000658280.korean: 아이 참~ 스틸라인 온라인 같은 거 말고 더 재밌는 게임이요.

1000658281.english: It's called "Heart-Pounding Stick Snack Game with Thetis"!

1000658282.english: Hehe, a huge reward is waiting, you know?

1000658283.english: The loser has to listen to everything the winner says for the rest of the day!
1000658283.korean: 패자는 오늘 하루 승자가 하는 말을 전부 들어주기예요!

1000658284.english: One person is biting the stick biscuit, and the other person is eating it. The side with the shorter remaining length wins, but here's a special rule!
1000658284.korean: 한 사람은 막대 과자를 물고, 다른 사람은 그걸 먹는 거예요. 남는 길이가 짧은 쪽이 승리하는 건데, 여기서 특별 규칙!

1000658286.english: I, I don't mind if our lips touch!

1000658287.english: So, to win, wouldn't it be better to touch lips instead? Because that's more advantageous!
1000658287.korean: 그러니 승리하려면 오히려 입술이 닿아야겠죠? 그 편이 유리하니까!

1000658288.english: Hahaha. How is it? Sounds like it would be fun, right? Then, um, since Thetis will be holding it first...
1000658288.korean: 꺄하핫. 어때요? 재밌을 것 같죠? 그, 그럼 테티스가 먼저 물고 있을 테니까...

1000658290.english: What is it! Then why did you ask?

1000658291.english: Profit...! Anyway, you're going to do it, right?

1000658292.english: If you don't do it, you're a coward, master~♡ You're an idiot who can't even eat the food that's been prepared~♡
1000658292.korean: 안 하면 주인님 겁쟁이~♡ 차려진 밥상도 못 먹는 바보~♡

1000658295.english: - I bit back the laughter that was threatening to burst out at his obvious behavior. Should I tease them a little more?
1000658295.korean: - 뻔히 보이는 행동에 터져나오려는 웃음을 꾹 눌러 참았다. 조금만 더 놀려줄까?

1000658296.english: Really? Are you saying you're a real coward and a fool?

1000658297.english: ... Heh heh. I considered that possibility as well.

1000658299.english: The most popular honey lip gloss these days!
1000658299.korean: 요즘 제일 잘 나간다는 허니 립글로스!

1000658300.english: It's made with honey, so it's really sweet. If I apply this... Hmm! How is it? Doesn't it shine brightly?
1000658300.korean: 꿀로 만들어서 되게 달콤하다구요. 이걸 바르면... 음! 어때요? 반짝반짝 빛나죠?

1000658301.english: It's sweet just by applying it, I wonder what it would be like to eat it directly... Huh?
1000658301.korean: 바르기만 해도 달콤한데 직접 먹으면 어떻게 되려나... 응?

1000658302.english: Heh heh, Master. Aren't you staring at my lips a little too much? Your gaze is so intense, it's going to melt my lip gloss!
1000658302.korean: 킥킥, 주인님. 너무 제 입술만 쳐다보시는 거 아니에요? 시선이 뜨거워서 립글로스가 녹겠는데요~

1000658303.english: Normally, this menu item is only available when you order directly at the cafe... Special service just for today!
1000658303.korean: 원래는 카페에서 직접 주문해야 나오는 메뉴지만... 오늘만 특별 서비스로!

1000658305.english: - I dipped my finger in Thetis's outstretched lips and put it in my mouth. Indeed, I could taste the unique sweetness of honey.
1000658305.korean: - 테티스가 내미는 입술에 손가락을 찍어서 입에 넣었다. 과연 벌꿀 특유의 달콤함이 느껴졌다.

1000658307.english: ... You've been doing that on purpose since earlier, haven't you?

1000658309.english: - Thetis, who had gotten off my body, sat on the bed and turned her back.
1000658309.korean: - 내 몸에서 내려간 테티스는 침대에 앉아 등을 돌려버렸다.

1000658312.english: - It seems like he's really angry. An effective way to handle this is...
1000658312.korean: - 화가 단단히 난 것 같다. 이럴 때 효과적인 방법은...

1000658313.english: - After apologizing and brushing Thetis's hair, she finally turned around slowly. It seems their anger hasn't completely subsided, as their gaze is still sharp.
1000658313.korean: - 사과하며 테티스의 머리카락을 빗겨줬더니 그제야 천천히 뒤를 돌아봤다. 화가 완전히 풀리진 않았는지 눈초리가 매섭다.

1000658315.english: What's there to say? The commander was clueless, so it was all useless, wasn't it?
1000658315.korean: 말해 뭐해요. 사령관이 눈치없는데 다 쓸모 없었죠, 뭐.

1000658316.english: Huh? Anyway, you don't really care about someone like me, do you?
1000658316.korean: 응~? 어차피 저 같은 건 별로 신경도 안 쓰잖아요?

1000658317.english: Rest well. I'm going to go now-
1000658317.korean: 푹 쉬세요. 전 이만 갈 거-

1000658318.english: - I pulled Thetis, who was trying to get up, and hugged her. I carefully touched his glossy lips with my finger.
1000658318.korean: - 일어나려는 테티스를 당겨서 끌어 안았다. 조심스럽게 윤기나는 입술에 손가락을 댔다.

1000658319.english: What, what are you doing? Why are you... your lips? Stop touching it.
1000658319.korean: 뭐, 뭐 하시는 거예요. 왜 입술을... 그만 만져요.

1000658320.english: That special service was only for earlier. I'm not going to give it back again, absolutely not.
1000658320.korean: 아까만 특별 서비스한 거예요. 다시 안 줄 건데요, 절대로.

1000658321.english: ...... Do you really want to eat it no matter what?

1000658323.english: Stick out your tongue. Please go to another employee to place your order.

1000658324.english: - I thought I had it all figured out, but it seems I still have a long way to go.

1000658328.english: - A satisfied sigh escaped. This should have calmed you down by now...
1000658328.korean: - 만족스러운 탄성이 새어나왔다. 이 정도면 화가 풀렸을 텐데...

1000658329.english: - As if my prediction had come true, Thetis soon turned back with a smile.
1000658329.korean: - 예상이 들어맞았는지, 곧 테티스가 웃는 얼굴로 돌아봐왔다.

1000658331.english: - At the same time as a playful laugh, I was pushed over. Thetis, who had climbed onto my body, took a stick snack out of her bosom.
1000658331.korean: - 장난기 섞인 웃음소리와 동시에 밀려 넘어졌다. 내 몸에 올라탄 테티스가 품에서 막대 과자를 꺼냈다.

1000658332.english: I'll give it to you if you win the game. Hahaha!

1000658333.english: - As I vowed to win, Thetis bit into a stick biscuit. Didn't I go first...?
1000658333.korean: - 승리를 다짐하는 내게 테티스가 막대 과자를 물렸다. 내가 선공 아니었나...?

1000658334.english: Hold on tight so you don't miss it.

1000658335.english: From now on, we'll only attack Thetis.

1000658338.english: - With a sharp, crisp sound, Thetis's face drew closer...
1000658338.korean: - 똑, 똑 부러지는 소리와 함께 테티스의 얼굴이 가까워지고...

1000658340.english: - Instead of a stick snack, a different sweetness was felt on the tip of my tongue.
1000658340.korean: - 혀 끝에서 막대 과자가 아닌, 다른 달콤함이 느껴졌다.

1000658342.english: - Before he knew it, the outcome of the match seemed unimportant, and Thetis was absorbed in the game.
1000658342.korean: - 어느새 승부 같은 건 아무래도 좋아진듯, 테티스는 정신없이 몰두했다.

1000658343.english: - It started as a joke, but before I knew it, I was also immersed, tightly hugging Thetis's body, which was trembling...
1000658343.korean: - 장난스럽게 시작했지만, 어느새 나도 움찔거리는 테티스의 몸을 꼭 안아주며 몰입했고...

1000658344.english: - That day, I was able to far surpass my previous record.
1000658344.korean: - 그날은, 종전의 기록을 아득하게 뛰어넘을 수 있었다.

1000658346.english: You look like you're having fun.

1000658348.english: I just stopped by on my way.

1000658351.english: Do you want me to help?

1000658352.english: This is Café Horizon! Everyone, please come and take a look!
1000658352.korean: 카페 호라이즌입니다! 다들 와서 한번씩 보고 가주세요!

1000658353.english: If the two of us do it, it will be finished quickly. Let's do it together.
1000658353.korean: 둘이서 하면 금방 끝날 거야. 같이 하자.

1000658355.english: No, let's rest a little before continuing.

1000658362.english: Is it not allowed to drink?

1000658363.english: You used to say we should take a bath together after exercising, what's going on?
1000658363.korean: 예전엔 운동 끝나면 같이 목욕하자고도 했으면서, 무슨 일이야?

1000658367.english: It's not that Nereid is strange.

1000658368.english: Anyone acts like that when they like someone.
1000658368.korean: 좋아하는 사람이 생기면 누구나 다 그래.

1000658369.english: If I get nervous too, we can't have a conversation, so I pretend to stay calm.
1000658369.korean: 나까지 긴장하면 대화가 안 되니까, 침착한 척하는 거지.

1000658372.english: You'll get used to it gradually.

1000658376.english: I helped, so handing out flyers finished quickly, right?
1000658376.korean: 내가 도와서 전단지 나눠주는 거 빨리 끝났지?

1000658377.english: Then it's okay to play with me that much, isn't it?
1000658377.korean: 그럼 그만큼 나랑 놀아줘도 괜찮지 않아?

1000658388.english: Why? Should I make something for you?

1000658390.english: Bûche de Noël. It's a French dessert, but...?

1000658392.english: It really looks like a log.

1000658394.english: Aren't you really talented in this area?

1000658396.english: It's like a new bride cooking for her husband, right?
1000658396.korean: 새색시가 남편 요리해주는 거 같다, 그렇지?

1000658402.english: Since when did you get this good at cooking?

1000658404.english: By the way, I'm full now...

1000658408.english: The one you made at Christmas.

1000658411.english: I really want to eat it.

1000658413.english: If Undine says no, you can't force it.
1000658413.korean: 운디네가 안 된다는데 강요해선 안 되잖아.

1000658416.english: You're not going to say no to this too, right?
1000658416.korean: 설마 이것도 안 되는 건 아니지?

1000658417.english: Is the genius patissier contradicting themselves with one bite?
1000658417.korean: 천재 파티시에르님께서 한 입으로 두말하는 거야?

1000658418.english: Really? Then do you remember the exact recipe?
1000658418.korean: 그래? 그럼 구체적인 레시피가 뭔지 기억하고 있어?

1000658424.english: They're all things I like anyway.

1000658426.english: I guess I have to go back.

1000658428.english: I tried to stop by the café, but it was locked.

1000658429.english: Really...? But why did Siren come out?
1000658429.korean: 그래...? 근데 세이렌은 무슨 일로 나왔어?

1000658431.english: You could have just brought the cup.

1000658435.english: Anyway, I have free time until evening.

1000658436.english: Think of it as paying for the coffee.

1000658438.english: Are there many customers at the café?

1000658440.english: Everyone is doing their best in their own area.

1000658442.english: Cleaning is simple but not easy.
1000658442.korean: 청소는 간단한 거지, 쉬운 게 아니잖아.

1000658443.english: Besides, Siren is also the manager.

1000658444.english: They're definitely doing more than their share.
1000658444.korean: 충분히 한사람 몫 이상 하고 있어.

1000658455.english: You said, "Please take care of me today."

1000658456.english: What should I do from now on, manager?

1000658457.english: I'll do whatever the manager tells me.

1000658465.english: Take a break before you go.

1000658466.english: Huh? Do I have to do more?

1000658468.english: ...Isn't it just a stick snack game?

1000658470.english: Oh... what are the game rules?

1000658477.english: I'll be the coward and fool.

1000658478.english: Then relax and stay a while.

1000658482.english: You really made it with honey? It's sweet.

1000658489.english: Why don't you call me master?

1000658490.english: I started wanting to eat Thetis's menu. Can I order?
1000658490.korean: 테티스의 메뉴가 먹고 싶어져서. 주문해도 돼?

1000658491.english: No matter what, it's not allowed?

1000658492.english: Yeah. I really want to eat it.

1000658494.english: I want to eat Thetis's menu.
1000658494.korean: 난 테티스 메뉴가 먹고 싶은 거야.

1000658503.english: - While watching a Momo animation shoulder to shoulder in the captain's cabin, I realized that Momo sitting next to me was covering her face.
1000658503.korean: - 함장실에서 어깨를 맞대고 모모 애니메이션을 보던 중, 옆에 앉아 있는 모모가 얼굴을 가리고 있다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000658505.english: - When I asked Momo if she had ever seen the Momo anime, she shook her head slightly.
1000658505.korean: - 모모 애니메이션을 한 번도 본 적 없냐는 내 물음에 모모는 작게 고개를 저었다.

1000658506.english: No... I've seen it a lot with Moonbit and Faucre...
1000658506.korean: 아뇨... 백토랑 뽀끄루랑 같이 많이 봤는데...

1000658507.english: This is the first time I'm watching it with the commander...

1000658508.english: - It's definitely understandable why they'd be embarrassed... Oh.

1000658509.english: - What we're watching now is a theatrical version that's kind of like a side story.
1000658509.korean: - 우리가 지금 보고 있는 건 일종의 외전에 해당하는 극장판.

1000658510.english: - Momo, who appeared on screen wearing a jet-black dress, smiled seductively at Hakuto.
1000658510.korean: - 새까만 드레스를 입고 등장한 화면 속의 모모는, 백토를 보고 요염하게 웃었다.

1000658512.english: That, that's really not okay... It's too much...
1000658512.korean: 저, 저건 진짜 안 돼요... 무리에요...

1000658513.english: - He pulled Momo closer, embraced her, and sealed her, then interlocked his fingers to stop her hand from turning off the screen.
1000658513.korean: - 모모를 끌어당겨 품에 안아 봉인하고, 화면을 끄려는 손을 깍지끼워 저지했다.

1000658514.english: I'm sorry. Momo is... I'm not a magical girl anymore. ]
1000658514.korean: [ 미안해요. 모모는... 더이상 마법 소녀가 아니게 되어버렸어요. ]

1000658515.english: [ The Magic Gentleman... Because he took Momo's entire body and soul... ♡ ]
1000658515.korean: [ 매직 젠틀맨이... 모모의 몸과 마음을 전부 가져갔으니까...♡ ]

1000658516.english: - I remembered Momo's Setting, which was forcibly implanted by Hraesvelgr.
1000658516.korean: - 흐레스벨그에게 강제로 주입당한 모모의 설정을 떠올렸다.

1000658517.english: - I heard that magical girls are supposed to exist for everyone, so if they fall in love with just one person, they become corrupted.
1000658517.korean: - 원래 마법소녀는 모두를 위해 존재하기 때문에, 누군가 한 명만을 사랑해버리면 타락해버린댔나.

1000658519.english: - Because Black Momo appeared near the end of the video, the ending credits and a message announcing the release date of the next movie soon followed.
1000658519.korean: - 블랙 모모가 등장한 건 영상이 거의 끝나갈 때쯤이었기 때문에, 곧 엔딩 크레딧과 다음 극장판 개봉일을 예고하는 문구가 올라왔다.

1000658520.english: - As I simply tried to find the next movie in the playlist and play it, Momo, who had been covering her face the whole time, began to squirm.
1000658520.korean: - 간단히 재생목록에서 다음 극장판을 찾아 재생하려 하자, 줄곧 얼굴을 가리고 있던 모모가 몸부림치기 시작했다.

1000658521.english: Oh, no! That's really not okay!
1000658521.korean: 아, 안돼요! 그건 진짜 안 돼요!

1000658522.english: No, no, I'll go instead, so please watch it alone!
1000658522.korean: 차, 차라리 저는 갈 테니까 혼자 봐주세요!

1000658523.english: - I stopped my hand due to the unexpected strong resistance.

1000658524.english: Um... There were a lot of really embarrassing moments there...
1000658524.korean: 그... 거기에서는 정말 부끄러운 모습이 많이 나와서...

1000658525.english: Even though I didn't act it out, that...
1000658525.korean: 아무리 제가 연기한 건 아니라고 해도, 그게...

1000658526.english: - As the video turned off, Momo let out a sigh of relief.
1000658526.korean: - 영상을 꺼버리자 모모는 안도의 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000658527.english: ... Commander, do you like it? Black Momo.

1000658528.english: - It's definitely a side of Momo you wouldn't normally imagine, so maybe it gives off a fresh charm...
1000658528.korean: - 아무래도 평소의 모모에게선 상상할 수 없는 모습이니까 신선한 매력이 느껴지려나...

1000658529.english: - Momo's face flushed slightly at my answer.
1000658529.korean: - 내 대답에 모모가 살짝 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000658530.english: Of course, I'll put it on and show you myself.

1000658531.english: Hehe, no. I'm not at all embarrassed to act. I'm a professional, you know.
1000658531.korean: 에헷, 아뇨. 연기는 하나도 부끄럽지 않은걸요. 이래봬도 프로니까요.

1000658532.english: - Back then, I should have listened more carefully to Momo's words.
1000658532.korean: - 그때 난, 모모의 말을 좀 더 귀담아 들었어야 했다.

1000658533.english: - Momo is... Because he was truly a professional.

1000658535.english: - She said she was going to change and left, but the person who returned wasn't the usually shy Momo, but a little devil who, as soon as she entered the room, threw me onto the bed, climbed on top of me, and gave me a sweet smile.
1000658535.korean: - 갈아입고 오겠다며 나갔다가 돌아온 것은 평소의 수줍음 타는 모모가 아니라, 방에 들어오자마자 나를 침대에 쓰러트리고 올라타 달콤한 미소를 짓는 소악마였다.

1000658537.english: - Whispering in my ear, Momo slowly, very slowly, with her lower body pressed against mine... She began to move her waist as if tempting.
1000658537.korean: - 귓가에 속삭인 모모는 하반신을 밀착한 상태로 천천히, 아주 천천히... 유혹하듯 허리를 움직이기 시작햇다.

1000658538.english: Uhuhu... cute gentleman... already like this...

1000658539.english: Um... I can't take it anymore...?

1000658540.english: - At my words, Momo chuckled seductively and brought her fingertips to my chest.
1000658540.korean: - 내 말에 모모는 쿡, 하고 요염하게 웃으며 손 끝을 내 가슴팍에 가져다 댔다.

1000658543.english: - Momo's slender fingers slowly traced up my neck and soon reached my lips.
1000658543.korean: - 모모의 가느다란 손가락이 천천히 내 목을 쓸어올리고, 곧 입술에 닿았다.

1000658544.english: Your friend, Magical Momo, is not...
1000658544.korean: 어린이 여러분의 친구, 매지컬 모모가 아니라...

1000658545.english: - The finger that had playfully pressed lightly on my lips falls away.
1000658545.korean: - 장난치듯 입술을 살짝 눌렀던 손가락이 떨어진다.

1000658546.english: - Soon, Momo hugged my neck and brought her face close.
1000658546.korean: - 곧, 모모는 내 목을 끌어안으며 얼굴을 가까이 했다.

1000658547.english: She only allowed her body and mind to a gentleman, and was thus corrupted...
1000658547.korean: 오직 젠틀맨에게만 몸과 마음을 허락해 타락해버린…

1000658549.english: - Momo... No, the moment Black Momo whispered and licked my lips,
1000658549.korean: - 모모... 아니, 블랙 모모가 속삭이며 내 입술을 핥은 순간,

1000658552.english: - Echidna raised her head and licked her glossy lips with her long tongue.
1000658552.korean: - 에키드나는 고개를 들며 긴 혀로 반질거리는 입술을 핥았다.

1000658553.english: I ate well. You're a real delicacy, aren't you?

1000658554.english: Then... Because I was completely satisfied...

1000658555.english: - Echidna rustled and burrowed under the covers.

1000658557.english: You should go to sleep soon too.

1000658558.english: - Just as he declared he would take all the pleasures of this world, Echidna is a character who enjoys pleasure.
1000658558.korean: - 이 세상 모든 쾌락을 가져가겠다던 본인의 선언처럼, 에키드나는 쾌락을 즐기는 성격이다.

1000658559.english: - But... Being fundamentally hedonistic, I quickly become satisfied with one type of pleasure. In other words, they quickly lose interest.
1000658559.korean: - 하지만... 기본적으로 쾌락주의자인만큼, 한 종류에 쾌락에 대해서는 금방 만족해 버린다. 다른 말로 하면, 금방 흥미를 잃는다는 것.

1000658560.english: - This is no exception even when we spend time together; he'll literally pounce on me like he's going to devour me in the middle, but he cools down quickly. Thanks to you, I often end up with incomplete combustion.
1000658560.korean: - 이건 함께 시간을 보낼 때도 예외는 아니어서, 도중에는 말 그대로 '잡아먹을 것처럼' 달려들긴 하지만 금방 식어버리는 편. 덕분에 나는 불완전 연소가 되어버리는 경우가 많다.

1000658561.english: - As I turned my body, looked at Echidna who was sleeping with her back to me, and felt a complicated emotion, an ominous thot occurred to me.
1000658561.korean: - 몸을 돌려 내게 등을 보이고 잠들어 있는 에키드나를 착잡하게 바라보던 중, 불길한 생각이 들었다.

1000658563.english: - While I was rummaging thru the Ark to improve my relationships with the crew members, I came across something that said long-term couples are prone to falling into a rut.
1000658563.korean: - 대원들과의 더욱 더 원만한 관계를 위해 방주를 뒤적이던 중, 오래된 연인은 권태기에 빠지기 쉽다는 내용을 봤었다.

1000658564.english: - The crew is getting tired of me? I won't let it stay that way...!

1000658567.english: - Because Echidna has very clear tastes, sleeping with her is always similar... No, it often flows in exactly the same way.
1000658567.korean: - 에키드나는 취향이 굉장히 확실하기 때문에, 에키드나와의 잠자리는 언제나 비슷한... 아니, 완전히 동일한 흐름으로 흘러가곤 한다.

1000658568.english: - To overcome a slump, it might be a good idea to start by trying this.
1000658568.korean: - 권태기를 이겨내려면, 이것부터 어떻게 해보는게 좋겠지.

1000658570.english: - Before I could even finish speaking, Echidna glared at me, forcing me to quickly change direction.
1000658570.korean: - 말을 끝내기도 전에 에키드나가 노려보는 바람에 급히 방향을 수정할 수밖에 없었다.

1000658572.english: - As expected, mentioning food gets a reaction.
1000658572.korean: - 역시 먹을거리 얘기를 꺼내니 반응이 오는군.

1000658573.english: - Since it was late, they decided to postpone breakfast until the next morning, and he embraced the still-turned-away Echidna from behind and went to sleep.
1000658573.korean: - 시간이 늦었으니 내일 아침을 기약하기로 하고, 여전히 등을 돌린 에키드나를 뒤에서 껴안고 잠을 청했다.

1000658575.english: - The next morning, I headed to the ecological conservation area with Echidna.
1000658575.korean: - 다음날 아침, 나는 에키드나와 함께 생태 보존 구역으로 향했다.

1000658576.english: - Not only reverse Big Sis and bunny girls, but also members in various costumes delight my eyes.
1000658576.korean: - 역바니와 바니걸은 물론, 다양한 의상을 입은 대원들이 내 눈을 즐겁게 한다.

1000658577.english: - Even so, it's a bit rude to be distracted while spending time together.
1000658577.korean: - 아무리 그래도 함께 시간을 보내는 중에 한눈을 파는 건 조금 그렇지.

1000658578.english: - Pull yourself together and be observant. Fortunately, Echidna was focused on the food lined up in the cafe display window.
1000658578.korean: - 정신을 차리고 눈치를 보자, 다행히 에키드나는 카페 진열창에 늘어선 먹거리들에 시선을 고정하고 있었다.

1000658580.english: Wait a moment. What are they selling at that stall over there?
1000658580.korean: 잠깐. 저기 노점에서 파는 건 뭐야?

1000658581.english: It looks like a sandwich, but it seems a little different.

1000658582.english: - Based on what I saw on the Ark, I explained that it was street toast, which is fried bread with butter, seasoned with sugar, and filled with a fried egg. Echidna's eyes lit up.
1000658582.korean: - 방주에서 봤던 것을 토대로 버터에 구운 식빵에 설탕으로 간을 한 계란 부침을 끼운 길거리 토스트라고 설명해주자, 에키드나는 눈을 빛냈다.

1000658585.english: - Fortunately for Echidna, but unfortunately for me, the ecological conservation area was lined with not only cafes but also numerous stalls set up by the crew members.
1000658585.korean: - 에키드나에게는 행운, 나에게는 불행하게도 생태 보존 구역에는 카페 외에도 대원들이 차린 노점상들이 잔뜩 늘어서 있었다.

1000658586.english: - In the end, I had to return to the captain's cabin, following Echidna and carrying as many packaged foods as there were street vendors.
1000658586.korean: - 난 결국 노점상들 갯수만큼의 포장된 음식을 들고 에키드나의 뒤를 따라 함장실로 돌아가야 했다.

1000658590.english: - I was exhausted from catering to all sorts of things, but seeing Echidna eating the food with the happiest expression in the world, I quickly felt fine again.
1000658590.korean: - 이것저것 맞춰주느라 진이 빠졌지만, 에키드나가 세상 행복한 얼굴로 음식들을 먹고 있는 걸 보니 금세 아무렇지도 않아졌다.

1000658591.english: Whew... Thank you. I ate well.

1000658593.english: - Licking her lips, Echidna looked at me with a strange gaze.
1000658593.korean: - 입술을 할짝인 에키드나는 묘한 눈길로 나를 바라봤다.

1000658594.english: And dessert... I want to eat it.

1000658597.english: - After pondering for a while, Echidna finally nodded.
1000658597.korean: - 한동안 고민하던 에키드나는 겨우 고개를 끄덕여 주었다.

1000658598.english: I'll make a special exception for you. I'm in a good mood because I ate a lot of delicious food today.
1000658598.korean: 특별히 허락 해줄게. 오늘은 맛있는 걸 많이 먹어서 기분이 좋으니까.

1000658599.english: ... You like it that much? It's all going to be the same anyway, no matter how you do it.
1000658599.korean: ...그렇게 좋아? 어차피 다 비슷할 텐데, 어떤 식으로 하든.

1000658600.english: - A strange emotion, similar to competitiveness, ignited within me at Echidna's words.
1000658600.korean: - 에키드나의 말에 승부욕과도 비슷한, 묘한 감정이 불타올랐다.

1000658601.english: What do you take me for? I don't say one thing and do another.
1000658601.korean: 날 뭘로 보는 거야? 한 입으로 두 말 안 해.

1000658602.english: What are you doing? Why the legs... uh...
1000658602.korean: 뭐 하는 거야? 왜 다리를- 으응...

1000658603.english: - That day, I did my best to show Echidna various new pleasures...
1000658603.korean: - 그날 나는 에키드나에게 여러가지 새로운 쾌락을 알려주기 위해 최선을 다했고...

1000658604.english: - At first, Echidna resisted the unfamiliar sensation, but soon she surrendered to it.
1000658604.korean: - 생소한 감각에 처음에는 저항하던 에키드나도, 곧 그것에 몸을 맡겼다.

1000658605.english: Are you ready...? Are you ready?!

1000658608.english: - Alfred grabbed my hand with a strange yell.
1000658608.korean: - 알프레드는 요상한 기합 소리와 함께 내 손을 잡았다.

1000658610.english: Hahaha, what's that? It was true, after all?

1000658611.english: You're the best! It's like bugs are crawling under my skin!
1000658611.korean: 저만하시겠습니까! 피부 밑을 벌레가 기어다니는 것 같은 느낌이란 말입니다!

1000658613.english: - A few days ago, Alfred, who had appeared even more dramatically than usual, was talking as if he were about to spit.
1000658613.korean: - 얼마전, 평소보다도 더 호들갑스럽게 등장한 알프레드는 입이 있었다면 침을 튀길 기세로 말을 늘어놓았다.

1000658614.english: - The fact that when I hacked the Orca computer network, you held my hand and didn't seem to care at all.
1000658614.korean: - 바로 내가 오르카 전산망을 해킹했을 때, 내 손을 잡았는데도 아무렇지도 않았었다는 것.

1000658615.english: - I thought my protein aversion might have been cured, so I decided to try it again...
1000658615.korean: - 단백질 혐오증이 고쳐졌을거라고 생각해서, 한 번 다시 시험해 보기로 했었는데...

1000658617.english: It's definitely a problem with the mind, not the body...! No matter how much I debug...!
1000658617.korean: 몸이 아닌 정신에 문제가 있는 것만은 확실한데...! 아무리 디버깅을 해봐도...!

1000658618.english: That's interesting too. So, even if you switch bodies, it's still the same?
1000658618.korean: 그건 또 흥미로운걸. 몸을 바꿔도 그대로라는 거야?

1000658620.english: That's interesting. Can I take a quick look too?
1000658620.korean: 그것 참. 잠깐 나도 봐도 돼?

1000658622.english: - As Peregrinus was examining Alfred's metal torso here and there with a look of curiosity, Glacias, who had been watching us silently, opened his mouth.
1000658622.korean: - 페레그리누스가 신기하다는듯 알프레드의 철제 몸통을 이곳저곳 살펴보던 중, 우리를 가만히 지켜보던 글라시아스가 입을 열었다.

1000658623.english: Alfred, I have a question for you.
1000658623.korean: 알프레드, 하나 묻고 싶은 것이 있다.

1000658624.english: Oh, thank you, ma'am. Ask me anything!

1000658625.english: Does your body also have tactile sensors?
1000658625.korean: 그대의 그 몸에도 촉각 센서가 있느냐.

1000658626.english: Of course! It looks shabby on the outside, but in fact, this fuselage is the result of decades of my work - ah!
1000658626.korean: 물론입죠! 겉보기엔 허름해보이지만, 사실 이 동체는 제가 수십년 동안 만들어낸- 악!

1000658629.english: - Peregrinus poked Alfred in the side with his fingertip... When I poked the same spot, Alfred screamed.
1000658629.korean: - 페레그리누스가 손가락 끝으로 알프레드의 옆구리... 같은 부분을 톡 찌르자 알프레드가 비명을 질렀다.

1000658630.english: Then... Could you possibly take a look at the settings for my sensor?
1000658630.korean: 그럼... 혹시 내 센서의 설정을 한 번 봐줄 수 있겠느냐.

1000658631.english: Touch is the first sense we experience, so it's hard to know if it's normal or not.
1000658631.korean: 촉각은 처음으로 느끼는 감각이라, 이게 정상인지 아닌지 알기 어렵구나.

1000658632.english: Okay, please send the data and I'll take a look at it right away!

1000658634.english: I could feel it, but it was a little different than it is now.

1000658635.english: It was less about touch and more about perception thru sensors.
1000658635.korean: 촉각이 아니라, 센서를 통한 인식에 가까웠지.

1000658636.english: If I can't feel anything at all, I won't know if I'm standing on the ground or if my swinging arms and legs have hit the enemy.
1000658636.korean: 아예 못 느끼면 내가 땅을 밟고 있는지, 휘두른 팔다리가 적한테 맞았는지 아닌지 모르니까.

1000658637.english: Of course, it's possible with visual sensors or other means, but this method is definitely the most accurate.
1000658637.korean: 물론 시각 센서나 다른 수단으로도 가능은 하지만, 아무래도 이쪽이 제일 정확하지.

1000658638.english: Oh. Alfred, is that sensor malfunctioning? More precisely, an algorithm that analyzes signals coming from sensors.
1000658638.korean: 아. 알프레드, 혹시 그거 센서 이상 아냐? 정확히는 센서에서 들어오는 신호를 분석하는 알고리즘.

1000658639.english: I checked, and it was fine...

1000658640.english: That's really amazing. Is it a bug?

1000658641.english: Ugh... I wonder when I'll finally be able to overcome this...
1000658641.korean: 크윽... 언제쯤되어야 이것을 이겨낼 수 있을지...

1000658642.english: Don't be too impatient. You'll definitely be able to overcome it.

1000658810.korean: - 내가 실망한 것을 눈치챘는지 니바가 급히 말을 이었다.

1000658811.english: If King Bunny cooperates, then even if it's not me, various reverse Big Sis will definitely be able to stay by King Bunny's side, right~?
1000658811.korean: 바니 대왕 씨가 협력해 준다면, 꼭 내가 아니더라도 다양한 역바니들이 바니 대왕 씨의 곁을 지킬 수 있을 거라구~?

1000658812.english: - Niba, who had approached again, carefully kept her body from touching mine and brought her face close to my ear.
1000658812.korean: - 다시 다가온 니바는, 몸이 닿지 않도록 조심하며 내 귓가에 얼굴을 가까이했다.

1000658813.english: You like it, don't you? Re.ver.se.Bun.ny♥

1000658814.english: - And that was the final blow.

1000658818.korean: 자아, 그럼 나를 따라 하는 거야.

1000658819.english: The reverse bunny suit is the best outfit.

1000658820.english: The reverse bunny is truly... That's the best costume...

1000658821.english: A bunny girl should rightfully be a reverse bunny.

1000658822.english: A bunny girl should... I have to become a reverse bunny girl...!

1000658823.english: Then... You're going with me...? Other reverse Big Sis are already waiting.
1000658823.korean: 그럼... 나랑 같이 가는거다...? 이미 다른 역바니들도 기다리고 있어.

1000658825.english: My master... You disappeared, leaving behind a laugh like a third-rate villain...
1000658825.korean: 주인님께서... 삼류 악당 같은 웃음소리를 남기고 사라져 버리셨습니다...

1000658826.english: Turning a crisis into an opportunity and taking down the leader in one fell swoop. That's a brilliant strategy.
1000658826.korean: 위기를 기회로 바꾸고 단숨에 우두머리를 치다니. 훌륭한 전략이군.

1000658827.english: Sigh... I thought he was just an ordinary idiot, but... That's going to be a headache.
1000658827.korean: 하아... 그냥 평범한 바보인 줄 알았는데... 골치 아프게 됐군요.

1000658828.english: You say it's a headache, but why?

1000658829.english: Because Master got so obsessed like that.

1000658830.english: It's obvious you'll be running around here and there for a while, grabbing anyone and jokingly saying, "I'll turn you into a reverse bunny!"
1000658830.korean: 또 한동안 이곳저곳 쏘다니면서 아무나 붙잡고 ‘너를 역바니로 만들어버리겠다!’하고 장난치실 게 뻔합니다.

1000658833.english: ...Sorry, Manager Ferro. This is as far as I go.

1000658836.english: I'll stick to that side. Seems like the wavelength matches.
1000658836.korean: 나는 저 쪽에 붙도록 하지. 파장이 맞을 것 같군.

1000658839.english: Wait, hold on! That kind of ridiculous...!

1000658841.english: There's no way I'd wear such a shameless outfit!
1000658841.korean: 그런 파렴치한 의상을 입을 리가 없잖습니까!

1000658842.english: The commander would like it, though?

1000658847.english: A-Are you really leaving?! What about the café!

1000658848.english: Oh, don't worry about the cafe, I'll be there for work.
1000658848.korean: 아, 카페는 출근할 테니 걱정하지 말도록.

1000658852.english: What kind of situation is this...?

1000658853.korean: 니히힛. 바로 여기야, 바니 대왕 씨.

1000658854.english: - I followed Niba and arrived at the outer edge of the ark.

1000658856.korean: 아, 사령관- 아니, 바니 대왕 씨...?

1000658860.english: Nih-hi-hi, these are the friends who have opened their eyes to the truth and decided to join me.
1000658860.korean: 니히히히, 진실에 눈을 뜨고 나와 함께하기로한 친구들이야.

1000658861.english: How is it? Do you like it? Huh? Huh?

1000658862.english: K-King Bunny, you really have fallen for the charm of the reverse Big Sis, haven't you...?
1000658862.korean: 바, 바니 대왕 씨는... 역바니에 매력에 빠지신 게 맞나요...?

1000658863.english: Mr. Bunny Slayer here boasted about it.
1000658863.korean: 여기 바니 슬레이어 씨가 호언 장담을 했었어요.

1000658864.english: They said that if you followed them, you would be favored by Mr. King Bunny.
1000658864.korean: 자기를 따르면 바니 대왕 씨의 총애를 한 몸에 받을 수 있을 거라고...

1000658865.english: - The questions I had while following them disappeared in an instant when I saw the four reverse Big Sis gathered together: the three of them and Niva.
1000658865.korean: - 따라오면서 들었던 의문은 세 명, 니바까지 네 명의 역바니가 모여있는 모습을 보자 순식간에 사라졌다.

1000658867.english: I'm so glad I worked hard on my diet... I didn't realize I'd have to show my whole stomach like this...
1000658867.korean: 다이어트 열심히 하기를 잘했어... 이렇게 배를 전부 내보여야할 줄은 몰랐는데...

1000658869.english: - There was one insolent reverse bunny who didn't join the warm atmosphere. As King Bunny, I cannot allow that.
1000658869.korean: - 훈훈한 분위기에 동참하지 않는 무엄한 역바니가 한 명 보였다. 바니 대왕으로서 용납할 수 없군.

1000658871.english: I don't care about that stuff.

1000658873.english: What did you just say, you traitor! No wonder you've been quietly following!
1000658873.korean: 지금 뭐라고 한 거야, 이 불순분자! 어쩐지 얌전히 따라온다 했더니!

1000658874.english: I will judge you right now!

1000658878.english: - Niba, who boldly held out a carrot, ran away immediately as soon as Titania glared at her.
1000658878.korean: - 호기롭게 당근을 들이댔던 니바는 티타니아가 째려보자마자 호다닥 도망가버렸다.

1000658882.english: - Upon hearing my answer, Titania surprisingly smiled gently.
1000658882.korean: - 내 대답을 들은 티타니아는 놀랍게도 부드럽게 웃었다.

1000658886.english: You too... that's why you're doing this stupid thing, right?
1000658886.korean: 너도... 그래서 이런 바보 같은 일을 벌인 거 아냐?

1000658888.english: We'll all work together to turn everyone else into reverse Big Sis!
1000658888.korean: 저희 모두 합심해서 다른 분들을 전부 역바니로 만드는 거예요!

1000658889.english: That's right. Just covering up isn't the way.

1000658890.english: To think that parts you can't show with a bunny girl outfit can be shown this attractively…!
1000658890.korean: 바니걸 의상으로는 보여줄 수 없는 부분을, 이렇게나 매력적으로 보여줄 수 있다니...!

1000658891.english: - Though trailing off and scratching their heads, it seemed enough for the reverse Big Sis.
1000658891.korean: - 말을 흐리며 머리를 긁적였지만, 역바니들에게는 그걸로 충분한 것 같았다.

1000658892.english: Nihihihi! Great~! From this moment on, I declare the official formation of the Reverse Bunny Squad!
1000658892.korean: 니히히히! 좋~았어! 지금 이시간부로, 역바니단의 정식 발족을 선언한다!

1000658893.english: We need to write a declaration... no, a declaration statement!

1000658895.english: ...But um, what exactly are we declaring?

1000658896.english: Of course, that reverse bunny is the best outfit, and there must be a clause strictly forbidding non-reverse bunny outfits.
1000658896.korean: 당연히 역바니야말로 최고의 의상이라는 것과, 역바니가 아닌 의상은 엄격히 금지한다는 조항이 있어야겠죠.

1000658897.english: And it should specify what penalties will be applied if anyone disobeys.
1000658897.korean: 그리고 그것을 따르지 않을 경우에 어떤 제재가 가해지는지도 명시해야 하구요.

1000658900.english: - Just seeing the reverse Big Sis gathered and talking makes my heart race.
1000658900.korean: - 역바니들이 모여서 이야기를 나누는 모습을 보기만 해도 가슴이 뜨거워진다.

1000658901.english: Looks like we arrived just in time. Doesn't it look fun?
1000658901.korean: 늦지 않게 도착한 것 같군. 재밌어보이지 않나.

1000658904.english: - Niba ran to them with a deeply moved expression.
1000658904.korean: - 니바는 몹시 감격한 얼굴로 둘에게 달려갔다.

1000658905.english: You've realized it too! The coolness of the reverse bunny!

1000658906.english: You could say that. Since we've found out this outfit really works well on the commander.
1000658906.korean: 그렇다고 할 수 있겠군. 이 의상이... 사령관에게 아주 잘 먹힌다는 걸 알았으니.

1000658907.english: Commander, you can't take your eyes off them after all.
1000658907.korean: 역시 눈을 떼지 못하고 있네요, 사령관님.

1000658908.english: - With just Gnome, Strato Angel, Titania, and Niba, my blood is already oversaturated with reverse bunny.
1000658908.korean: - 노움, 스트라토 엔젤, 티타니아, 니바 넷 만으로도 내 혈중 역바니 농도는 과포화 상태.

1000658909.english: - When you're barely holding onto your sanity, seeing such destructive behavior...
1000658909.korean: - 가까스로 이성을 유지하고 있는 상태에서, 이런 파괴적인 모습을 봐 버리면...

1000658912.english: Ah, don't worry. Sometimes that happens.
1000658912.korean: 아아, 걱정하지 말도록. 가끔 그럴 때가 있으니까.

1000658914.english: That's the expression you make when you completely surrender to your desires...
1000658914.korean: 완전히 욕망에 몸을 맡기셨을 때의 표정이시네요...

1000658915.english: Okay, just a moment. I'm not quite ready for that yet.
1000658915.korean: 자, 잠시만요. 저는 아직 그런 것까지는 마음의 준비가-

1000658916.english: Kyaaat?! The stomach, you shouldn't touch the stomach... But...
1000658916.korean: 꺄앗?! 배, 배는 만지시면 안되는... 데...

1000658917.english: I, I trained hard to become a great rabbit, so...
1000658917.korean: 저, 저는 훌륭한 토끼가 되기 위해서 열심히 훈련을 했으니까...

1000658920.english: You, you're doing something so obscene! Stop it right now!
1000658920.korean: 이, 이런 외설적인 짓을 벌이다니! 당장 그만두지 못해!

1000658921.english: Hee, hee-eek?! You went that far?!

1000658925.english: Hmm, then why was that outfit worn?
1000658925.korean: 흐음, 그럼 그 의상은 왜 입은거지?

1000658927.english: Well, do as you please. For me, it's just my share increasing.
1000658927.korean: 뭐, 좋을 대로 하도록. 나야 내 몫이 늘어나는 거니까.

1000658929.english: I don't know the details, but I think Lea and her sisters also spent time like this with the Commander.
1000658929.korean: 잘은 몰라도, 레아 양과 그 자매들도 사령관과 이런 시간을 보냈댔지 아마.

1000658931.english: No... Thinking about my own case, it might've even been more intense.
1000658931.korean: 아니... 내 경우를 생각해보면 이보다 더할수도 있겠군.

1000658932.english: They joined the resistance around the same time as me, after all.
1000658932.korean: 저항군에 합류한 시기는 나랑 크게 다르지 않으니까.

1000658934.english: King Bunnyyy... N-No, we shouldn't be doing this... Huh?
1000658934.korean: 바니 대왕 씨이... 아잉, 안되는데에... 에?

1000658936.english: Ah, you're here...? I-I'll move out of the way...

1000658937.english: Hmph... That person is too scary...

1000658939.english: Don't worry. The Commander—yes, King Bunny—is strong.
1000658939.korean: 걱정 말도록. 사령관... 그래, 바니 대왕은 강인하니까.

1000658940.english: Your turn will come soon enough.

1000658942.english: ...No. I, the Bunny Slayer, have no interest whatsoever in such obscene things!
1000658942.korean: ...아니. 나, 바니 슬레이어는 그런 외설적인 것에 추호도 관심이 없다!

1000658943.english: Doesn't really sound that way. You seemed pretty into it earlier.
1000658943.korean: 그런 것 치고는 좋아하는 것 같던데. 아까 전에도 그렇고.

1000658944.english: T-T-That was because of the curse engraved on my body!
1000658944.korean: 그그그그건! 이 몸에 새겨진 저주 때문일 뿐이라구!

1000658948.english: I never heard anything about having to wear a uniform like this!
1000658948.korean: 나는 이런 유니폼을 입어야 된다는 말은 못 들었다고!

1000658949.english: And what's with these cat ears and tail?!
1000658949.korean: 그리고 이 고양이 귀랑 꼬리는 또 뭔데!

1000658950.english: Really...? What exactly did the Commander say to you?

1000658951.english: ...He just said your café was short on help and asked if I'd be willing to work.

1000658953.english: We're sorry, we just asked the Commander to prepare another outfit with cat accessories added...
1000658953.korean: 죄송해요, 저희도 그냥 사령관님한테 고양이 악세서리를 추가한 의상 하나를 더 준비해달라고만 들어서...

1000658954.english: And honestly, we're a little embarrassed too.

1000658955.english: Then why wear something like this at all?
1000658955.korean: 그럼 굳이 이런걸 왜 입는 거야?

1000658956.english: Because the Commander said he liked it.

1000658957.english: Hold on a second. I'll go get something else. We've got a few prototype outfits—
1000658957.korean: 잠깐만 기다려주세요. 다른 걸 가져올게요. 시안으로 만들어둔 게 몇 벌-

1000658964.english: The Commander would never lie to us.
1000658964.korean: 사령관님은, 저희한테 절대로 거짓말을 하지 않으세요.

1000658966.english: How can you be so sure?

1000658967.english: Because just as the Commander trusts us, we trust him too.
1000658967.korean: 사령관님이 저희를 믿어주시는만큼, 저희도 사령관님을 믿으니까요.

1000658971.english: Excuse me for a moment, it's a busy time.

1000658972.english: Here's the work manual I've compiled. Please check this today, and starting tomorrow, let's tackle the easier tasks one by one.
1000658972.korean: 여기 제가 정리한 업무 매뉴얼이에요. 오늘은 이거 확인하시고, 내일부터 쉬운 일부터 하나씩 해봐요.

1000658973.english: Haa... What's all this for anyway...?

1000658977.english: Heh heh. No, I understand the uniform, but... What is a cat, anyway?
1000658977.korean: 킥킥. 아니, 유니폼까지는 이해하겠는데... 고양이는 대체 뭐냥?

1000658978.english: Are you feeling like you want to be patted by a hand warmer now?

1000658979.english: ... Shut up before I kill you.

1000658985.english: But that's a pretty good choice for you.
1000658985.korean: 그런데, 너 치고는 꽤 잘한 선택이네.

1000658986.english: Don't change the subject. Because I'm going to kill you.

1000658987.english: No, no, I'm not changing the subject. That outfit, you know.
1000658987.korean: 아니아니, 말 돌리는게 아니라. 그 옷 말야.

1000658988.english: Hot Pack's gonna love that, you know?

1000658990.english: Because Hot Pack likes sexy stuff.

1000658992.english: Look. It's not just these cafes, other kids are all wearing revealing clothes too.
1000658992.korean: 봐봐. 꼭 이 카페들 뿐만 아니라, 다른 애들도 다 야하게 입고 다니잖아.

1000658993.english: Why else would they do that? It's all to get Hot Pack's attention.
1000658993.korean: 그럼 뭐겠어. 다 핫팩한테 잘 보이려고 저러는 거지.

1000658996.english: ..But our JangHwa, you're so cute when you blush like that~
1000658996.korean: ...근데 우리 장화, 그렇게 얼굴 붉히고 있으니까 엄청 귀엽네~

1000658997.english: This big sis is seriously touched.

1000658999.english: For someone who says no, you sure aren't resisting~ Pat pat~ Good girl~
1000658999.korean: 싫다는 것 치곤 손에 힘이 없는데~? 쓰담쓰담~ 착하지~

1000659003.english: Instead of standing around like that, just go ask Hot Pack yourself, you idiot.
1000659003.korean: 그러고 있지 말고 그냥 핫팩한테 가서 해달라고 해, 등신아.

1000659004.english: Even if I don't say it...

1000659005.english: Well, once you taste affection, your personality might go in a strange direction... but it seems like you have the capacity to embrace it to that extent.
1000659005.korean: 뭐, 네 성격에 한 번 애정을 맛보면 이상한데로 튈 수도 있을거긴 한데... 그정도 품어줄 그릇은 있어보이고.

1000659007.english: But the more I look at this outfit, the cuter it gets. Hey, can I work with you too?
1000659007.korean: 근데 이 옷 볼수록 귀엽네. 야야, 나도 같이 일할까?

1000659009.english: Kick. It's not about being rejected. Huh?

1000659010.english: What day is it today? This time, a real cat came.
1000659010.korean: 오늘 무슨 날인가? 이번에는 진짜 고양이가 왔네.

1000659011.korean: 페로... 점장님? 무슨 일로 이렇게 급하게...

1000659012.english: Sirene, as the manager of Cafe Amor, I would like to request your official cooperation.
1000659012.korean: 세이렌 점장님. 카페 아모르의 점장으로서 정식 협력을 요청드립니다.

1000659013.english: Some of our staff have rebelled... They took the master...!
1000659013.korean: 저희 직원중 일부가 반란을 일으켜서... 주인님을 데려갔어요...!

1000659015.english: Station... Bunny? What is that outfit?

1000659016.english: Ah, reverse vanilla... It's a great costume, isn't it? I was actually thinking of suggesting that for our uniforms at first.
1000659016.korean: 아아, 역바니라... 훌륭한 의상이지. 나도 처음엔 우리 유니폼을 그걸로 하자고 할까 생각했었다구.

1000659017.english: ... In a bunny girl outfit, it's a style of clothing where the parts that were originally covered by fabric are now exposed, while the parts that were originally exposed are now covered.
1000659017.korean: ...바니걸 복장에서, 옷감이 없는 부분을 가리고 옷감이 있던 부분을 내보이는 형식의 의상입니다.

1000659020.english: Um, then... Isn't it practically the same as being naked...?
1000659020.korean: 그, 그러면... 알몸이랑 다를 게 없지 않나요...?

1000659022.english: But... The important thing is that the master was captivated by that outfit.
1000659022.korean: 하지만... 그런 복장에 주인님이 홀리셨다는게 중요하죠.

1000659023.english: Huh... I didn't know there was such an outfit.

1000659024.english: Neri, should we try it too? Reverse bunny.

1000659028.english: You... You were thinking dirty thoughts again, weren't you?

1000659030.english: Ugh. How are you going to manage if you're like this over something so small?

1000659031.english: We should have made our uniforms more aggressive too...
1000659031.korean: 우리 유니폼도 더 과격하게 했었어야 하는데...

1000659032.english: This, this is more than...? Is that possible?

1000659033.english: Kick. Stupid Neri. You used a lot of fabric for this, didn't you?
1000659033.korean: 킥. 바보 네리. 이정도면 천을 엄청 많이 쓴 거라구?

1000659036.english: Anyway, that's why I'm in a situation where I need help.

1000659037.english: Yes. Of course I'll help you.

1000659039.english: Well, I don't think the master is really going to grab all of us and make us wear reverse bunny costumes, is he? If you think of it as just a small event...
1000659039.korean: 뭐, 주인님도 진짜로 저희를 전부 붙잡아서 역바니 의상을 입히려는 건 아니실 테니까요. 작은 이벤트 정도라고 생각하면...

1000659044.english: When you shouted that the reverse bunny suit was the best outfit, it felt scarily sincere...
1000659044.korean: 역바니야말로 최고의 의상이라고 외치실때는 무서울 정도로 진심이 느껴졌으니까요...

1000659048.english: He really said... that reverse bunny is the ultimate outfit...?

1000659050.english: Heh heh, no, you must've misheard—

1000659051.english: "Reverse bunny is the ultimate outfit, and it's even written in the Bunny Slayer!"
1000659051.korean: 역바니야말로 최고의 의상이며, 이는 ‘바니 슬레이어’에도 쓰여 있다!

1000659058.english: The two of them... they looked at each other, nodded, and then ran off...
1000659058.korean: 두 분... 서로를 보면서 고개를 끄덕이시더니 달려나가셨어요...

1000659059.english: This is the worst-case scenario. That was the one thing those two absolutely should not have heard...
1000659059.korean: 최악의 상황입니다. 저 두 명의 귀에만은 들어가지 않았어야 하는데...

1000659060.english: Anyway, I'd better go after them. Well then.

1000659064.english: It looks like the Commander is up to something again.
1000659064.korean: 사령관님께서 또 뭔가 장난을 치시려는 것 같아요.

1000659065.english: Ahh, I see. I thought it was something serious.

1000659067.english: Do I... have to wear something like that too...?
1000659067.korean: 네리도... 저런 거, 입어야 되는 거야...?

1000659068.english: Actually, I... I think that level will be difficult...
1000659068.korean: 사실 저도... 저정도는 어려울 것 같아요...

1000659069.english: What if the commander asks you to wear it?

1000659071.english: Then... I think I'll only show it to the commander. Wearing it and walking around...
1000659071.korean: 그러면... 사, 사령관님한테만 보여드릴 것 같아요. 입고 돌아다니는 건...

1000659073.english: Why is this person so serious? Wait a minute!

1000659078.english: Hehe, sorry. He's a bit lacking in social skills.
1000659078.korean: 에헤헤, 미안. 얘가 좀 사회생활 능력이 부족해서.

1000659080.english: Okay... This is how I'll be recognized...

1000659081.english: Once we've dealt with all the rebels... They'll only look at me...
1000659081.korean: 반란을 일으킨 녀석들을 전부 처리하면... 걔는 나만 봐줄거야...

1000659082.english: It's just a joke, okay? Look over there, everyone's just playing around.
1000659082.korean: 그냥 장난이라니까? 저기 봐봐, 다 그냥 노는 거지.

1000659083.english: ...... You're saying you're rebelling as a joke?

1000659084.english: So... Oh, how do I explain this?
1000659084.korean: 그러니까... 아 이걸 어떻게 설명해야 되지.

1000659085.english: There... Manager? Could you explain it to them for me?
1000659085.korean: 거기... 점장님? 나 대신 얘한테 설명좀 해줄래?

1000659086.english: Just like a hunting dog, his eyes went wild at the mere mention of rebellion.
1000659086.korean: 누가 사냥개 출신 아니랄까봐 반란 한마디에 눈이 돌아가 버렸어.

1000659088.english: Miss JangHwa, that's not a rebellion... hmm, yeah. It's more like an event.
1000659088.korean: 장화 양, 저건 반란이 아니라... 음, 그래. 이벤트 같은 거예요.

1000659090.english: Yes. It's something the Commander organizes to give us some enjoyment.
1000659090.korean: 네. 사령관님이 주도해서, 저희를 위해 만들어 주시는 즐길 거리요.

1000659092.english: It's gotten a bit better now, but not long ago, our lives were just a cycle of fighting to survive and resting for the next battle.
1000659092.korean: 지금은 조금 나아졌지만, 얼마 전만 해도 저희의 생활은 살아남기 위한 전투와 다음 전투를 위한 휴식의 반복일 뿐이었어요.

1000659093.english: But gradually, we gained some breathing room... enough to celebrate year-end holidays and anniversaries...
1000659093.korean: 그런데 조금씩 여유가 생겨서... 연말연시나 기념일을 챙길 수 있을 정도가 되고...

1000659094.english: And now, we can even take long vacations like this.
1000659094.korean: 지금처럼 긴 휴가를 보낼 수도 있게 됐죠.

1000659095.english: And every time that happens, the Commander starts organizing all sorts of things for us.
1000659095.korean: 그리고 그럴 때마다, 사령관님은 저희를 위해 여러가지 일을 벌여주시기 시작하셨어요.

1000659096.english: No wonder everyone looked familiar with this. So it's not the first time?
1000659096.korean: 어쩐지 다들 익숙해 보인다 했어. 처음이 아녔구나?

1000659097.english: Yeah. From quirky stuff like cooking contests, to New Year's event competitions and idol stages... there were many things.
1000659097.korean: 네. 요리 대회처럼 엉뚱한 것부터 시작해서, 새해 행사 공모전에 아이돌 무대까지... 여러가지가 있었거든요.

1000659099.english: I haven't heard directly, but I heard the Commander said this to Captain Yong:
1000659099.korean: 저는 직접 들은 적은 없지만... 용 대장님한테 그런 말씀을 하셨대요.

1000659100.english: "It's nice to see sides of you all we don't usually get to see, and to see your happy smiles."
1000659100.korean: 평소에 볼 수 없던 너희들의 모습과, 즐거워하는 미소를 볼 수 있어서 좋다, 고요.

1000659102.english: For something like that, this looks way too serious, doesn't it?
1000659102.korean: 그런것치곤 저거, 좀 너무 진심인 것 같은데?

1000659103.english: I can feel the madness in insisting everyone wear those reverse-bunny outfits no matter what.
1000659103.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 역바니 옷을 입히겠다는 광기가 느껴져.

1000659105.english: They're probably serious... …and they like the sexy stuff too...
1000659105.korean: 지, 진심이시긴 할 거예요. ......야, 야한 것도 좋아하시니까...

1000659106.english: S-Still! Everything they do is because they care about us! Please don't misunderstand!
1000659106.korean: 그, 그래도! 전부 저희를 생각해서 하시는 일이에요! 오해하지 말아주세요!

1000659108.english: Hey, that's what they say, right?

1000659110.english: That person... Should I like you too...?

1000659111.english: Of course. As I mentioned earlier, you'll genuinely love seeing Ms. JangHwa in that uniform.
1000659111.korean: 그럼요. 아까도 말씀드렸지만, 그 유니폼을 입은 장화 양의 모습을 보시면 진심으로 좋아해주실 거예요.

1000659113.english: Oh my, look at this kid. Anyway...

1000659117.english: This cafe, are you not hiring any more staff?
1000659117.korean: 여기 카페, 직원 더 안 뽑아요?

1000659118.english: - In front of the gathered crew members, wondering what was happening, I shouted passionately.
1000659118.korean: - 무슨 일인가 하고 모여든 대원들 앞에서, 나는 열정적으로 외쳤다.

1000659122.english: There's something that's bothering me a little... Because it's there...

1000659124.english: Even tho I'm wearing this reverse bunny costume now...
1000659124.korean: 지금은 이렇게 역바니 의상을 입고 있지만...

1000659125.english: A wonderful rabbit... So, I received help from someone to become a bunny girl.
1000659125.korean: 훌륭한 토끼... 그러니까, 바니걸이 되기 위해서 어떤 분의 도움을 받았거든요.

1000659126.english: If he could see me now... I'm worried you might feel betrayed...
1000659126.korean: 그분이 지금 제 모습을 보시면... 배신당했다고 생각하시지 않을지...

1000659129.english: That very anguish is the cornerstone of becoming an excellent reverse bunny.
1000659129.korean: 바로 그런 고뇌야말로, 훌륭한 역바니가 되기 위한 초석이지.

1000659130.english: Suffer, be in pain! Right at the end, the blessing of the reverse bunny will descend!
1000659130.korean: 고뇌해라, 고통스러워해라! 바로 그 끝에, 역바니신의 가호가 내려올지니!

1000659131.english: Will you please stop instilling useless ideas in my disciple?
1000659131.korean: 내 제자에게 쓸데없는 사상을 주입하는 건 그만둬주겠어?

1000659135.english: Come at me! I'll slaughter you so you can't even open your mouth!
1000659135.korean: 덤벼라! 아예 입도 뻥긋 못하게 도륙을 내주마!

1000659142.english: ... I know. Because I betrayed the sergeant.

1000659145.english: A teacher is responsible for the mistakes of their students.

1000659146.english: This is all... It is my fault for being immoral.

1000659151.english: With great power... That much responsibility is necessary.

1000659153.english: I won't blame you, Sergeant Gnome. It was a fate I had to accept eventually anyway.
1000659153.korean: 너를 탓하진 않겠어, 노움 병장. 어차피 언젠가는 받아들였어야만 하는 운명이었으니까.

1000659154.english: Of course, I didn't know it would be now... I will use this power to put you back where you belong.
1000659154.korean: 물론 그게 지금이 될 줄은 몰랐지만... 이 힘, 너를 돌려 놓는 데에 쓰겠다.

1000659156.english: Hmph. It's already a rank I'm going to miss.

1000659157.english: But... I am now Sergeant Efreeti.

1000659158.english: Come here, Sergeant Gnome. From now on, I won't waste a single second taking you down!
1000659158.korean: 와라, 노움 병장. 지금부터 널 쓰러트리는데에, 단 1초도 낭비하지 않겠다!

1000659162.english: I didn't know there were guys like that too... My belief in my reverse bunny is wavering...
1000659162.korean: 저런 녀석들도 있었다니... 내 역바니에 대한 믿음이 흔들리잖아아...

1000659163.english: Oh, the god of reverse Big Sis... Why such a trial for me?
1000659163.korean: 흑, 역바니의 신이시여... 어찌 저에게 이런 시련을-

1000659166.english: - With a low, ominous rumble, someone appeared.
1000659166.korean: - 웅웅 거리는 흉흉한 소리와 함께, 누군가가 나타났다.

1000659167.english: So I left Faucre in charge... We even went thru the final ritual together...
1000659167.korean: 그래서 뽀끄루를 맡겼고... 너와 마지막 의식까지 치렀던 건데...

1000659168.english: Hmm, I can feel a strong bunny spirit. So you're the de facto leader of the bunny girls here?
1000659168.korean: 흐응, 강렬한 바니 혼이 느껴져. 네가 여기 바니걸들의 실질적인 수장이구나?

1000659169.english: No wonder. King Bunny was enthusiastic and fought well, but his bunny horn wasn't very good.
1000659169.korean: 어쩐지. 바니 대왕 씨는 의욕하고 파이팅은 좋은데, 바니 혼은 별로였어.

1000659171.english: Aaaah! What, what is this? It's a chainsaw!

1000659176.english: - Before I knew it, the rabbit and the reverse bunny had become completely absorbed in their own world, as if I didn't even exist.
1000659176.korean: - 어느새 자기들만의 세계에 빠져버린 토끼와 역바니는 나는 안중에도 없는 것 같았다.

1000659178.english: Oh my, that weapon... That looks interesting, doesn't it?

1000659180.english: ... You might have to do that.

1000659181.english: - Of course, there's no bloodshed, but the battle of beliefs between Gnome and Efreeti, and Niba and Moonbit is intensifying more and more.
1000659181.korean: - 당연히 피가 튀는 건 아니지만, 노움과 이프리트, 니바와 백토간의 신념을 건 전투는 점점 격화되고 있다.

1000659184.english: Just give up and be satisfied with being a bunny girl.

1000659185.english: Big Brother, are you crazy?! You want me to wear something that embarrassing?!
1000659185.korean: 오빠야 니 미칫나! 저런 남사시러운 걸 입으라꼬?!

1000659188.english: Ahaha... The commander is starting to do something crazy again...
1000659188.korean: 아하하... 사령관이 또 엉뚱한 일을 벌이기 시작했어...

1000659190.english: Anyway, I wonder if Titania did well...

1000659191.english: - The situation is not good. The bunny girls opposing my reverse bunny policy are rallying, and not only Horizon but also other members are siding with the bunny girls.
1000659191.korean: - 상황이 좋지 않다. 내 역바니 정책에 반대하는 바니걸들이 결집하고 있고, 호라이즌은 물론, 다른 대원들도 바니걸 측에 붙고 있다.

1000659192.english: King Bunny, you can do it. Be confident.
1000659192.korean: 바니 대왕 씨, 할 수 있어요. 자신감을 가지세요.

1000659193.english: With me... So intensely... Because you said so...!

1000659195.english: - Saying that, I walked out confidently.

1000659196.english: - As I stood in the center of the fountain square, eyes began to gather one by one.
1000659196.korean: - 내가 분수 광장 중앙에 서자, 하나둘 시선이 모이기 시작했다.

1000659197.english: King Bunny... You've made a decision!

1000659198.english: - I nodded to Niba, took a deep breath, and calmed my mind.
1000659198.korean: - 니바에게 고개를 끄덕여주고 심호흡을 해 마음을 가라앉혔다.

1000659201.english: - With the help of Arsenal and Azaz, they raided and seized Cafe Amor while holding an operational meeting. During this, Niba, who had disappeared somewhere, reappeared and held out a piece of cloth.
1000659201.korean: - 아스널과 아자즈의 도움으로 카페 아모르를 습격, 탈취하고 작전 회의를 하던 도중, 어디론가 사라졌던 니바가 천조각을 내밀었다.

1000659203.english: This is a royal robe just for King Bunny. It's an item containing the blessing of the god of reverse bunny girls and mine!
1000659203.korean: 바니 대왕 씨만을 위한 성복이야. 역바니의 신님과 내 축복이 담겨 있는 물건이지!

1000659204.english: - Just as my ominous premonition had predicted, the fabric I unfolded was a reverse bunny suit.
1000659204.korean: - 내 불길한 예감처럼, 펼쳐본 천조각은 역바니 슈트였다.

1000659205.english: Here are some stickers too. I made it specifically for me to use.
1000659205.korean: 여기 스티커도. 특별히 내가 쓰는걸로 했어.

1000659207.english: - Seeing me speechless at the unexpected turn of events, Niba's expression hardened.
1000659207.korean: - 예상 외의 전개에 차마 말을 잇지 못하는 나를 보며, 니바의 표정이 굳어졌다.

1000659209.english: If King Bunny really understands the coolness of reverse bunny, he'll be able to wear it just fine. Right?
1000659209.korean: 바니 대왕 씨가 정말로 역바니의 멋짐을 안다면, 충분히 입을 수 있을 거야. 그렇지?

1000659210.english: Nih-hi-hi, I'm such a fool. It's not like anyone other than King Bunny would refuse a reverse bunny suit, right?
1000659210.korean: 니히히, 나도 참. 다른 누구도 아니고 바니 대왕 씨가 역바니 슈트를 거부할리도 없잖아~

1000659211.english: - A delicious-looking giant carrot was suddenly aimed right under my chin.
1000659211.korean: - 먹음직스러운 거대 당근이 어느새 내 턱밑까지 겨누어져 있었다.

1000659215.english: - But that's just because he likes the members wearing it. There's no way you'd like what I'm wearing!
1000659215.korean: - 하지만 그건 대원들이 입어주는 걸 좋아하는 것일뿐. 내가 입는 걸 좋아할리가 없잖아!

1000659216.english: - But... That reverse-bunny maniac named Niba would never tolerate it.
1000659216.korean: - 하지만... 이 니바라는 이름의 역바니 광인은 그것을 결코 용납하지 않을 터.

1000659217.english: - I... I have to make a choice.

1000659218.english: - He slowly stops his hand, which was reaching for the buttons of his shirt.
1000659218.korean: - 천천히 셔츠의 단추로 가져가던 손을 멈춘다.

1000659219.english: Once you make a decision, there's no turning back. More and more members are hearing the news and gathering here.
1000659219.korean: - 결정을 내리면, 더는 돌이킬 수 없다. 점점 더 많은 대원들이 소식을 듣고 이곳으로 모이고 있다.

1000659221.english: - I squeezed my eyes shut and unbuttoned my shirt one by one.
1000659221.korean: - 눈을 질끈 감고 셔츠 단추를 하나씩 풀어내렸다.

1000659222.english: - The sound of the crew members murmuring can be heard faintly.

1000659223.english: - Ignoring it with effort, he mechanically unbuttons his shirt.
1000659223.korean: - 그것을 애써 무시하며, 기계적으로 단추를 풀어나간다.

1000659224.english: - Finally, as I unbuttoned all the buttons and grabbed the waistband of my pants...
1000659224.korean: - 마침내 모든 단추를 풀고, 바지춤을 붙잡는 순간...

1000659226.english: - Someone's voice, followed by a strong impact.
1000659226.korean: - 누군가의 목소리, 그리고 이어지는 강한 충격.

1000659227.english: - I... He lost consciousness just like that.

1000659228.english: - No matter what, I felt this wasn't right.
1000659228.korean: - 아무리 그래도, 이건 아니라는 생각이 들었다.

1000659229.english: - Just as I was about to give up and turn around, in front of me...

1000659231.english: - There was Niba, holding out a carrot and smiling brightly.
1000659231.korean: - 당근을 들이대고 환하게 웃고 있는 니바가 있었다.

1000659233.english: Nih-hi-hi, betrayal now? No way! That's impossible.
1000659233.korean: 니히히, 이제 와서 배신이라니. 설마~ 그럴리가 없지.

1000659234.english: After treating me so badly, you're just going to throw me away like an old shoe? Oh, come on!
1000659234.korean: 나한테 그렇게나 심한 짓을 해놓고 헌신짝처럼 버린다고~? 에이~

1000659236.english: Nih-hi-hi... With that, you'll receive the true blessing of the reverse bunny girl - Ugh?!
1000659236.korean: 니히히... 그걸로 진정한 역바니의 은총을 받는- 읏?!

1000659237.english: Don't try to deceive the Magic Gentleman!

1000659238.english: Ugh... I thought I'd have a little more time...!
1000659238.korean: 큭... 조금 더 시간을 벌 수 있을 줄 알았는데...!

1000659239.english: Then, King Bunny, I trust you! Niba trusts King Bunny!
1000659239.korean: 그럼 바니 대왕 씨~ 나 믿는다~ 니바는 바니 대왕 씨 믿어~

1000659241.english: - Now that I've heard those words, I can't hesitate any longer. My pride as a man won't allow it.
1000659241.korean: - 그런 말을 들은 이상, 더는 머뭇거릴 수 없다. 남자로서의 자존심이 허락하지 않는다.

1000659242.english: - The moment he slowly unbuttoned every button of his shirt and reached for his pants.
1000659242.korean: - 천천히 셔츠의 모든 단추를 풀고, 바지춤에 손을 대는 순간.

1000659244.english: - Someone's voice, followed by a strong impact.
1000659244.korean: - 누군가의 목소리, 그리고 이어지는 강한 충격.

1000659245.english: - I... He lost consciousness just like that.

1000659247.english: Are you feeling a bit better...?

1000659248.english: - I slowly came to my senses at the familiar voice.

1000659250.english: - As Ferro spoke, my memories slowly began to return.

1000659251.english: - I... I was about to do something ridiculous...

1000659252.english: - Noticing this and rushing over, Ferro dove in...
1000659252.korean: - 그것을 눈치채고 달려온 페로가 몸을 날려서...

1000659253.english: You, it was such an urgent situation that I bumped into you a little hard. Are you okay?
1000659253.korean: 너, 너무 급한 상황이라 조금 세게 부딪혔습니다. 괜찮으신가요?

1000659254.english: - I continued speaking in a daze, cradled in Ferro's arms.
1000659254.korean: - 페로의 품에 안겨 멍한 상태로 말을 이었다.
